channel.title: Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno on Craig Otieno
channel.description: Recent content in Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno on Craig Otieno

item.title: Contact
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description:
I am open to opportunities, collaborations, and project discussions related to data science, data analytics, survey analysis, public health, geospatial analysis, machine learning, automated reporting, and development-focused research.

Get in Touch
#

You can reach me through:

item.title: Resume
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description: I am a statistician, data analyst, and data scientist based in Nairobi, Kenya, with experience in survey analysis, public health analytics, human rights data, geospatial analysis, automated reporting, dashboard development, and machine learning.

item.title: Kenya DHS MNCAH Equity Analysis
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description: A survey-weighted health equity analysis of MNCAH and household indicators across Kenya’s 47 counties using DHS 2014 microdata.

item.title: Maji Ndogo: Water Access Analysis
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description: A SQL, Python, and Power BI project analyzing water access, infrastructure gaps, queue times, and data integrity in a fictional African nation.

item.title: SDG Dataset Matcher
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description: A Python pipeline that matches UN-DESA datasets to official SDMX SDG indicators using fuzzy matching and confidence scoring.

item.title: About
item.author: craigthompsonotieno@gmail.com (Craig Thompson Omondi Otieno)
item.description:
I am Craig Thompson Otieno, a statistician, data analyst, and data scientist based in Nairobi, Kenya.

I build data-driven solutions that transform raw and complex datasets into clean, structured, and decision-ready insights. My work spans survey analysis, geospatial mapping, automated reporting, dashboard development, and applied data science for public health, human rights, labour markets, and development policy.
